title: storage — HTTP routes
description: Three host groups. Workspace host owns the upload + download + attachment CRUD surface. Platform-admin owns cross-workspace inspection + antivirus dashboard + signed-URL audit read + emergency quarantine. Central host owns signed-URL redemption (unauthenticated — the signature is the credential).

routes.description: Single-request upload. Body is multipart/form-data with `file`, `kind`, optional `fileable_type` + `fileable_id`. Returns the created File (status=uploading). Antivirus scan runs async; File flips to available on scan clean.

Initiate a chunked upload. Body: filename, total_size_bytes, declared_mime_type, target_kind, optional declared_sha256 + target_fileable_type/id. Returns the ChunkedUpload row + `upload_url` (only on this response — hidden on subsequent reads).
Read the current ChunkedUpload state — used on resume-after-crash to know which chunks are missing.
Upload a single chunk. Client PATCHes with chunk bytes + Chunk-Index + Chunk-SHA256 headers (tus.io style). Server appends to the ledger.
Finalise. Server verifies reconstructed SHA-256 against declared_sha256 (if set) + validates MIME sniff + fires FileUploaded + queues antivirus scan. Returns the created File.
Abort an in-flight upload. Sets state=aborted, cleans up provider-side chunks, reclaims quota reservation.
spatie/laravel-query-builder list. Filters: kind, fileable_type, fileable_id, mime_type, virus_scan_state, visibility. Includes: variants, owner, fileable.
Single file with a freshly-signed `url` + `variants` map.
Update display name, visibility, metadata. Cannot change kind / fileable / size / mime.
Soft-delete. Blob stays until retention window elapses (see retention.json).
Issue an explicit signed URL. Body: reason (download|preview|share|admin_action), ttl_seconds (bounded by plan tier), optional ip_lock CIDR + user_lock ULID + one_time_use. Writes a SignedUrlAudit.
Bulk-revoke every active signed URL for this file. Sets revoked_at + revoked_reason=admin_bulk_revoke on every SignedUrlAudit row.
Force async regeneration of every variant declared by the file's kind. Idempotent — existing variants are overwritten.
List all FileVariants for this File with fresh signed URLs.
Convenience redirect — issues a short-lived signed URL + 302s. Same effect as POST /signed-url + follow. Writes a SignedUrlAudit with reason=download.
Cross-workspace file inspection. Filters: workspace_id, virus_scan_state, kind.
Full file detail including hidden internals (path, sha256, disk, reference_count) with `?include=storage_internals`.
Antivirus dashboard — every file with virus_scan_state IN (infected, quarantined, scan_failed).
Requeue ScanFileForVirusesJob for the file. Useful after AV signature update.
Manually move a file to quarantine (e.g. abuse report). Sets virus_scan_state=quarantined + revokes all signed URLs + fires FileVirusFound with signature=`manual`.
Immediate hard-delete bypassing retention window. Compliance surface for takedown notices + DSAR erasure. Cascades to variants + audits. Decrements blob refcount.
Live storage pipeline status: driver reachability, AV scanner heartbeat, variant queue depth, chunked-upload count by state.
Cross-workspace signed-URL audit trail. Filter by workspace_id + file_id + reason + issued_at range. High-cardinality endpoint — paginated 50 rows/page default.
Force reconciliation of storage.bytes.consumed for a workspace (SUM of File.size_bytes vs recorded entitlement usage). Corrects drift.

groups.name: central-storage-redemption
notes: NO auth middleware — the signed URL signature IS the credential.
storage.audit-hit reads the signature from the URL, hashes SHA-256, looks up the SignedUrlAudit row, verifies not expired / not revoked / ip-lock / user-lock, increments hit_count, sets last_hit_at.
The response is a byte stream from Storage::disk({disk})->readStream({path}) OR a 302 redirect to the driver's own pre-signed URL when driver supports it (S3, GCS).

routes.description: Redeem a signed URL against the parent File. Signature encodes (file_id, expires_at, hash).
Redeem a signed URL against a specific FileVariant. Signature encodes (variant_id, expires_at, hash).

storage-workspace.reason: Upload burst tolerance but rejects sustained abuse.

storage-redemption.reason: Redemptions are cheap when CDN caches; the limit blocks credential-stuffing attempts against short-lived signatures.
